main.description: Operator-side attestation that the authoring account claims to operate a specific automated account. Intended to be cross-checked against the subject account's automation declaration.

subject.description: DID of the automated account this account claims to operate.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the operated account, such as its purpose, brand relationship, or expected behavior.

createdAt.description: Optional RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this operator attestation was first created.

updatedAt.description: Optional RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this operator attestation was last updated.
